rationale: Scope fence holds: git show --name-only 4dfebbcb lists exactly the 9 planned files, one commit, no internal/bead, no refutation code, no Decision.AppliedRefutations field (only a comment noting the message never contains 'refut'). AC5 diff-review: exactly the four named flips confirmed byte-for-byte — panel_decision_test.go dissent row (Allow→Block), panel_advisory_test.go rename to _Dissent_WouldBlock + new all-APPROVE _Passing_WouldPass companion, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go at-threshold row (exit0→wantErr) + all-APPROVE companion, votedecision_test.go 5/6 row (Pass→VoteBlock) + all-APPROVE companion. All eight outcome-preserving updates (a-h) verified present: panel_test.go x3 (ConfigDefault/GateFieldInert/AllEnumValues) now feed genuine 6/6 APPROVE; panel_gate_e2e_test.go approveVerdicts() now all-APPROVE (fresh_passes/stale_blocks unaffected, confirmed by reading the test bodies); panelstate_test.go beadPanel synthesizes real verdict strings + at_threshold_fresh/TestRenderPanelState_Pass restructured to threshold=6; panel_decision_test.go expected_reviewers:3 row now 3/3 APPROVE; the two decision-parity 'at-threshold' rows (cmd panel_test.go, panelstate_test.go DelegatesToPanelGateDecision) restated with recorded approve_threshold=6. No fixture outside this set changes outcome. One procedural observation, not scored against this bead: at review time internal/panel/gate.go showed a transient uncommitted working-tree edit (leg 9.5 guarded by `false &&`, gate.go mtime ~18s old) — almost certainly a concurrent reviewer's live mutation-probe on the shared worktree, not part of 4dfebbcb; left untouched per read-only discipline since my analysis is pinned to the commit via git show, not the working tree.
findings: Observation (non-blocking): at inspection time, internal/panel/gate.go had a transient uncommitted diff mutating the leg 9.5 guard to `false && len(unresolved) > 0` (file mtime seconds before my check) — consistent with a concurrent reviewer's (likely F1's) in-flight mutation probe on the shared bead worktree, not a change introduced by or attributable to commit 4dfebbcb. Not reverted (read-only, avoid disrupting a possibly-live concurrent test). Recommend the panel orchestrator confirm `git status --porcelain` is empty in this worktree before running `mindspec complete`, per the plan's own reviewer-scratch-discipline note.
